summary: New internal/syncstate package: persists last-sync state to ~/.local/share/apify-pp-cli/sync_state.json (atomic tmp+rename). The run and workflow run commands write a record after they hydrate the local store (last_synced_at, ok flag, items hydrated, token source); the file is consumable by doctor and external tooling without a fresh API call.
rationale: Surfacing when fresh data last landed without re-invoking sync. Pattern adopted from the granola printed CLI's post-print patch set.
